evals.prompt: Optimize this resume for a Staff Software Engineer role at a FAANG company. Current issues: skills section is just a wall of text, experience bullets describe tasks not impact, GitHub isn't mentioned, and there's an outdated objective statement. I have 9 years of experience, built distributed systems at scale, and led a team of 6.
evals.expected_output: A fully optimized tech resume with restructured skills, impact-focused bullets, and appropriate senior positioning
expectations: Output removes the objective statement and replaces with a technical summary
Output restructures the skills section into categories (not a wall of text)
Output rewrites experience bullets to focus on scale and impact
Output adds GitHub and technical contribution presence
Output positions the candidate appropriately for Staff Engineer level (leadership + technical scope)

evals.prompt: I'm a frontend engineer with 4 years of experience applying for both senior IC roles and tech lead roles. Optimize my resume so it works for both audiences. Key background: React, TypeScript, performance optimization (improved LCP by 40%), and I've mentored 2 junior engineers.
evals.expected_output: A dual-purpose optimized tech resume that positions for both senior IC and tech lead audiences
expectations: Output identifies the key differentiator for tech lead positioning (mentorship, leadership signals)
Output keeps technical depth for IC roles (React, TypeScript, LCP metric)
Output features the 40% LCP improvement prominently as a technical impact metric
Output recommends a flexible summary that can be adjusted per application
Output structures experience to show both technical and leadership contributions
